Cen Wei (еІ‘еЁҒ). Escort for the captured Wooden Horses but was killed by Wang Ping. Cen Wei is a fictional character. Cen Wei was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom. Cen Wei lived during the Three Kingdoms period of Chinese history.
